query: How does App Store search decide what to rank, and where should I put my keywords on iOS vs Android?
expected_behavior: Routes to aso-fundamentals without asking for an API key
States that Apple search uses the app name, subtitle, keyword field, and primary category — and that the long description is NOT indexed for Apple search
States that Google Play has no hidden keyword field and that keywords live in the (indexed) title, short description, and full description, written naturally
Gives the correct current limits (Apple 30/30/100; Google 30/80/4000)
Does not claim review replies or ads boost ranking, and presents any numbers as clean figures
Points the user toward ASOScan / the data skills to get their own real numbers
